title: VETERANS VOICE — Dental care for vets; Florida’s VA; bringing back the Draft?
meta_description: VA Dental Care Expanding With the recent passage of the Dental Care for Veterans Act, all veterans enrolled in VA health care will gradually become eligible for dental services over a four-year rollout. Starting now, those with service-connected disabilities, Purple Heart recipients, prisoners of war, or those with financial need will be the first to qualify. Each year, new groups of veterans will gain access, with all enrolled veterans expected to have coverage by 2029. The program includes preventive and restorative services, such as cleanings, fluoride treatments, X-rays, fillings, crowns, and dentures. Stay tuned for further news as the rollout advances.
body_text: VA Dental Care Expanding: With the recent passage of the Dental Care for Veterans Act, all veterans enrolled in VA health care will gradually become eligible for dental services over a four-year rollout. Starting now, those with service-connected disabilities, Purple Heart recipients, prisoners of war, or those with financial need will be the first to qualify. Each year, new groups of veterans will gain access, with all enrolled veterans expected to have coverage by 2029. The program includes preventive and restorative services, such as cleanings, fluoride treatments, X-rays, fillings, crowns, and dentures. Stay tuned for further news as the rollout advances. Florida Department of Veterans Affairs: Did you know that the State of Florida has its own Veterans Affairs agency? It is one of the largest state veterans’ programs in the U.S., providing additional services to veterans and enhancing federal VA programs. A great example is the chain of state veteran nursing homes, including one in Orlando. In fact, the Orlando facility was originally a federal VA facility at Lake Baldwin, and when a new VA facility opened up at Lake Nona, the state took over the existing facility, while the VA continues to operate Lake Baldwin as a clinic. There is a new 2026 state guide to veterans’ benefits, available at https://bit.ly/4vk5999 . News media ask the “Draft” question: Our troops are in harm’s way once again, with the campaign of air and missile attacks on Iran that started at the end of February. At least 13 of our military members have been killed, including seven by enemy fire. Dozens more have been wounded. Our hearts go out to their families. At this time of writing, the second of two airmen who ejected from their damaged F-15E over Iran has been dramatically rescued, with rescue forces suffering casualties, but no one was killed in the attempt. Whenever a new conflict arises, media figures question if the draft should return, sparking debate. Mentioning “draft” often prompts veterans to recall their service from Vietnam, Korea, or World War II. The Vietnam-era draft ended in 1973, and registration resumed in 1980. Today, talk of a draft quickly raises questions about women’s eligibility and whether past exemptions—like those for college or sole surviving sons— would still apply. Though the chance of reinstating the draft seems slim, it would be divisive. For now, we can only hope this campaign winds down and draft discussions fade—until peace is next disrupted. As always, please send along veteran-related events, issues, or questions to osceolavets@gmail.com.

title: 韩庚的继父首次出镜，住牡丹江大平层，卢靖姗和婆婆关系亲如母女_妈妈_婆家_父母
body_text: 韩庚的继父首次出镜了，是一个非常憨厚能干的长辈。韩庚和继父在镜头前，并没有太多的热络的互动。也许是他们早已经习惯了。 韩庚的妈妈和继父目前住在牡丹江的大平层，光是客厅就已经是普通人的小套房那么大了。由此可见，韩庚这些年的收入还是颇丰的。 韩庚公开了当年追求卢靖姗的往事。原来当年，卢靖姗是因为韩庚的妈妈才和韩庚有了进一步的发展。 卢靖姗和婆婆的关系一直都非常融洽，甚至比母女还要亲。韩庚的妈妈真的会做人，她当着韩庚外公的面，称呼卢靖姗为“外孙女”。 从3个细节，来看看卢靖姗的情商有多高。第一，卢靖姗一进门就夸婆婆漂亮，开始热情拥抱。第二，卢靖姗和韩庚家里的每个亲戚都逐一热情拥抱过去，甚至还夸韩庚表弟。 这3个细节，足以看出卢靖姗是一个大方的女子。难怪韩庚会喜欢她。同时也看出，韩庚家里的所有的人都非常喜欢卢靖姗。 看到婆家人的其乐融融，卢靖姗内心是感怀感恩和激动的。当卢靖姗和婆家人打麻将的时候，韩庚一个人在厨房做饭。 而自己的婆婆帮忙带娃的时候，却能够每天炖汤给她喝。她感受到了婆婆的善意和满满的爱。 看了节目，才发现卢靖姗真的是一个非常善良、大方、温暖、高情商的女子，她从来没有矫揉造作，更没有摆架子，反而和婆家人打成一片。

title: Navy HR modernization effort in limbo as CIO, CNP clash | Federal News Network
meta_description: Personnel leaders said the contract was allowing the Navy to pursue the cancellation of IT programs that had failed to deliver results for years.
headings: Navy HR modernization effort in limbo as CIO, CNP clash
body_text: Personnel leaders said the contract was allowing the Navy to pursue the cancellation of IT programs that had failed to deliver results for years. The Navy’s top IT and personnel leaders are butting heads over the future of the service’s human resources modernization effort. At the center of the internal clash is a relatively small $170 million contract awarded in 2024 to Pantheon Data. Personnel leadership saw the contract as one of the pivotal efforts to modernize Navy HR systems. But Department of the Navy Chief Information Officer Jane Rathbun, along with the Department of Government Efficiency , killed it — ignoring warnings that the move would stall progress, cripple promotion boards and hurt the Navy’s ability to recruit and retain talent, according to a document submitted to the House Appropriations Defense Subcommittee by Navy personnel officials, obtained by Federal News Network and verified by the subcommittee. Personnel leaders told House lawmakers that Rathbun recommended switching back to the system that is “seven years behind the schedule” and “has not progressed as desired.” She also argued that government workers could handle the work contractors were performing internally. Meanwhile, personnel leaders said “there is no ability for government employees to carry out this work.” “Contracting the work is not only more practical, efficient and significantly faster than attempting to grow the skillset internally,” personnel leaders told House Appropriations Defense Subcommittee. The Navy has spent more than a decade trying to modernize how it hires, pays, promotes and retires its sailors. Between 2013 and 2015, then-Chief of Naval Personnel Adm. Bill Moran launched a series of reforms aimed at overhauling the service’s human resources systems and processes — an effort that would later become the “MyNavyHR transformation.” Its primary goal was to improve sailors’ HR experience by consolidating over 55 disparate, antiquated systems into a streamlined, integrated digital infrastructure. In 2018, then-Chief of Naval Personnel Vice Adm. Robert Burke said, “By the end of 2019, sailors will do most of their personnel business by smartphone ashore or desktop applications afloat. By 2023, they will have forgotten about today’s personnel system and many of its frequent frustrations.” By 2023, however, the $1.6 billion initiative was failing to deliver on those promises. If anything, sailors grew more frustrated with the effort. Lawmakers started pressing the Navy leadership for answers. In the report accompanying the fiscal 2025 defense policy bill, senators said they were “aware of the urgency of the MyNavyHR modernization program due to ongoing issues with Department of the Navy personnel experiencing significant delays in pay, retirement and other benefits critical to their morale and readiness,” and directed the Navy secretary to provide a detailed briefing by April 2025 outlining the program’s structure, budget and data integrity strategy. Meanwhile, sailors were voicing their struggles publicly — a review of complaints on Reddit showed the depth of MyNavy HR modernization’s failures. One person wrote on Reddit in 2022, “J oined active-duty Navy a few months ago after transferring from another branch and I haven’t received my moving entitlements or [basic allowance for housing (BAH)] w/dependents. At the moment the Navy owes me around $8,000. Mix this with inflation, a newborn, a wife no longer working…it is seriously affecting my [quality of life]. My financials are good but I never planned on the Navy jacking up my pay for 4 months straight. I’ve worked for at least two companies that employ more people than the Navy does, NOT ONCE did they jack up my pay. ” After all those years of struggle, Navy personnel leaders turned to Pantheon to reset the effort. The Chief of Naval Personnel (CNP) office brought in the firm to move sailors’ records from an aging data center located in Millington, Tennessee to the cloud. The Millington data center stores most of sailors’ personnel and promotion records, but the facility faces multiple risks: Its servers are aging, it sits in a known flood zone and it is vulnerable to extreme weather events like tornadoes, according to Navy personnel officials. Should anything happen to the data center, Navy officials and industry experts say there is no searchable backup that would allow the Navy to continue operating without disruption. Sources familiar with the contract said Pantheon initially focused on making the data more authoritative, moving it to the cloud and ensuring the backup was fully searchable and usable. While getting a backup into the cloud was a critical first step, the company was also working on establishing a continuity of operations capability, automating manual HR and payroll processes using artificial intelligence and reducing legacy system dependencies. The service also tasked Pantheon with modernizing talent management and recruiting processes through process automation. According to personnel, Rathbun recommended the contract for cancellation for several reasons. The CIO argued that the Pantheon’s contract was duplicative of the Navy Pay and Personnel System (NP2), and that civilians and military personnel could do the work instead, according to the document the CNP provided to House appropriators. But Navy personnel leaders pushed back, telling the House Appropriations Defense subcommittee the canceled contract did not overlap with NP2 and that government employees did not have the skillset needed to perform the work. In fact, with the Navy’s cloud migration nearly complete, officials said it would be “financially irresponsible” to begin building this skillset so late in the process. What is more, NP2 has been plagued by delays and cost overruns — the program is seven years behind the schedule and more over budget than the Defense Civilian Human Resources Management System (DCHRMS), which Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth killed in March for poor performance. If allowed to continue, the total cost of NP2 is projected to exceed $12.9 billion, according to the document provided to the subcommittee. When the Navy brought in Pantheon, the cost of the NP2 system had skyrocketed to over $1 billion, with no meaningful progress to show for it. The Navy was still operating 55 legacy systems that cost $122 million per year to maintain, Navy personnel officials told the subcommittee. “Given the administration’s goal to eliminate wasteful spending, and direction to eliminate duplicative spending, continuing NP2 is no longer prudent. NP2 has not produced the intended results, is behind schedule and vastly over budget. NP2’s continued scheduled delays have resulted in the Navy having to expend even more resources on legacy systems that are past end of life and do not meet the needs of the service. Furthermore, NP2 is duplicative,” Navy personnel leaders told the House Appropriations Defense Subcommittee Navy HR officials told the subcommittee Pantheon work was helping Navy to cancel the troubled NP2, along with the MyNavyHR Authoritative Data Environment contract and MyNavyPortal. They argued the Navy structured the Authoritative Data Environment in a way that prevented the shutdown of legacy systems. And while MyNavy Portal has been successful as a landing page, officials said its current plan largely duplicates more advanced capabilities already available through N1’s Salesforce-based enterprise customer relationship management (eCRM) platform. “This contract has elements intended to mitigate failures in cost, schedule and performance of MyNavyHR transformation efforts. These efforts, specifically NP2 (Oracle PeopleSoft 9.2), have not delivered on schedule, requiring legacy systems to remain operational well beyond their end of life. Additionally, the program office has constructed the ADE in a manner that does not support shutting down legacy IT systems or support the Navy’s data needs. The contract would have corrected those flaws,” N1 told House appropriators. Behind the contract’s cancellation also lies a broader disagreement over who holds authority for Navy personnel IT systems and modernization efforts. While the CIO’s office sets servicewide IT policies and reviews IT investments, it is the Chief of Naval Personnel who owns personnel management requirements, including related IT systems and the congressional funding. Sources familiar with the contract said that DOGE had advised the Secretary of the Navy that responsibilities for those systems should fall under DON CIO. “The cancellation of that contract was a Navy leadership decision. While the Chief of Naval Personnel/Deputy Chief of Naval Operations for Personnel (OPNAV N1), is responsible for the requirements, planning, programming and funding of all personnel, manpower and training resources for the Navy, the way ahead for ensuring the security of our personnel data at [the Millington Data Center] will be led by DON CIO, as the Secretary has directed,” Bill Speaks, deputy public affairs officer for the Chief of Naval Personnel, told Federal News Network, in response to questions about who holds the authority over the canceled contract and whether the CNP or CIO is ultimately responsible for managing personnel systems. Rathbun ‘s office declined to comment, saying it had nothing to provide at this time. Pantheon Data declined to comment on the cancellation of the contract, but said in a statement to Federal News Network, “Over the past two years, the Chief of Naval Personnel and his team have made commendable progress in addressing long-standing challenges in talent management and data modernization. Pantheon Data is proud to have contributed to these efforts and would welcome the opportunity to continue supporting this important mission if given the opportunity.” For over a decade, the Navy’s IT community led the modernization initiative on behalf of the manpower and personnel department, despite it being closest to the sailors. But after years of limited progress, the Chief of Naval Personnel stepped in to lead the effort directly, awarding the Pantheon contract — which was delivering results, according to CNP and internal Navy emails obtained by Federal News Network. “The old mainframes will be decommissioned on September 30, 2026, and this contract was on track to migrate the Millington data center to the cloud before that date, to comply with Navy policy and fully addressing this critical vulnerability,” Navy personnel officials told the House Appropriations Defense Subcommittee. And Rathbun acknowledged that N1 had achieved the critical first step of moving a backup into the cloud. While Pantheon led that the effort, Rathbun attributed the work to the Naval Information Warfare Center and Bureau of Naval Personnel in an email to Chief of Naval Personnel Vice Adm. Richard Cheeseman, despite the fact that those organizations did not perform the actual development, according to sources familiar with the contract, who requested anonymity to talk freely about the situation. Even with the progress made, CNP and the CIO office had disagreements over how long it would take to restore operations in the event of a critical failure. “Some progress has been made, a backup capability exists, but it’s not sufficient for operating the Millington data center applications in the cloud. This was a necessary first step to ensure we had a full copy of the Millington data center ecosystem in case of a critical data center failure. In the event of a critical data center failure, we can restore from the copy of the data center, but it will likely take weeks to rebuild the infrastructure necessary to perform that restore since usability of that data and applications to conduct operations from the cloud has not yet been achieved,” Rathbun said in a May 15 email to Cheeseman, which Federal News Network obtained. Navy personnel officials, however, estimate that losing the aging servers at Millington could lead to 12-to-16 months of severe disruptions to HR operations, including the inability to hold promotion boards for both enlisted and officer personnel, according to the House Appropriations Defense Subcommittee document. “The inability to execute promotion boards will negatively impact on uniform personnel morale and decisions to remain in the service. Additionally, this could further threaten our ability to continue to meet our recruiting goals,” personnel officials told the subcommittee. Navy personnel officials also told the House Appropriations Defense Subcommittee there was no plan in place to mitigate the impact of the contract’s cancellation. Sources familiar with the matter said DON CIO has been on a “crash course to sole source” a replacement contract since then. Speaks told Federal News Network the Navy is “exploring options for modernizing its HR systems to best support our sailors, civilians and their families.” Lawmakers on the House Appropriations Committee were caught off guard by the cancellation of the Pantheon contract. “Chairman Calvert’s staff has requested more information from the Navy about the rationale behind the cancellation. The chairman was under the impression that HR modernization efforts were saving the Navy money, therefore the cancellation appears counter to the DOGE mission and ongoing efforts to find efficiencies,” Jason Gagnon, senior advisor to Rep. Ken Calvert (R-Calif.) who leads the appropriations subcommittee on defense, told Federal News Network. Pantheon has already received $34 million of the $170 million it was awarded. N1 told the subcommittee the contract cost the Navy about $40 million a year — saving the service over $322 million per year in research and development and operations and maintenance costs. Over five years, the CNP estimated that those annual savings would total about $900 million. If you would like to contact this reporter about recent changes in the federal government, please email anastasia.obis@federalnewsnetwork.com or reach out on Signal at (301) 830-2747 Copyright © 2026 Federal News Network. . title: Hearing set to discuss closure of Uniontown schools
meta_description: The Uniontown Area School District board will hold a public meeting later this month to discuss closing two schools after next year in response to declining enrollment numbers. The district board voted 7-0 Monday to schedule a hearing for May 27 to discuss closing Franklin Elementary School in Vanderbilt and Marclay Middle School in Markleysburg. […]
headings: Hearing set to discuss closure of Uniontown schools
Franklin Elementary, Marclay Middle being eyed
body_text: The Uniontown Area School District board will hold a public meeting later this month to discuss closing two schools after next year in response to declining enrollment numbers. The district board voted 7-0 Monday to schedule a hearing for May 27 to discuss closing Franklin Elementary School in Vanderbilt and Marclay Middle School in Markleysburg. Monday’s vote follows one at a meeting last week to realign grade levels district-wide to kindergarten through fifth grade, sixth through eighth grades and ninth through 12th. Superintendent Daniel Bosnic said “right-sizing” facilities was a necessary move in the wake of decades-long trends of declining enrollment and staff shortages. In the 2006-07 school year, he said, the district had 3,344 students, a graduating class of 231, and 267 teachers. This year, those numbers stand at 2,466 students (a 26% decline), 143 soon-to-be graduates (down 38%) and 176 teachers (down 34%). Bosnic also pointed to a declining tax base, bond debt, rising costs and changes in census data that directly impact funding. “Doing more of the same is simply no longer sustainable,” he said. “We must now focus on how we move forward. This means being honest about the number of students we serve and identifying the structural system that best fits our needs.” Cost estimates prepared by the firm Crabtree, Rohrbaugh and Associates in April for the study assumed the closure of Franklin Elementary School and Marclay Middle School. In the scenario laid out by Crabtree, middle school students would all attend Lafayette Middle School, while the other schools except for the high school would become K-5. Addressing critical building upgrade needs at all schools in the district would cost between $17.9 million and $20.6 million, Larry Levato, a principal at the firm, told the board earlier this year. He said comprehensive renovations would cost between $125.2 million and $143.1 million. Unlike another configuration evaluated by Crabtree — moving to K-6 and 7-12 — the district would not need to renovate any buildings to add classrooms, Bosnic said. In response to questions from the board, Bosnic said the district did not plan to eliminate any positions as a result of the new model. The board had previously planned a vote on closing Franklin Elementary School at the end of the year for its March meeting before announcing it would take more time to deliberate, postponing closure by at least a year. “I empathize with those who have strong emotions, cherished memories associated with these schools,” Bosnic said. “However, I value the future of the people inside those buildings far more than the structures themselves. This financial reality requires thoughtful and proactive action. If we fail to act now, we risk being forced into future decisions that will be far more disruptive, reactive and difficult for our students, staff and community.” Parents were critical of the potential closures Monday. Scott Fordyce, whose child is entering kindergarten, said he wanted to see more transparency from the district about how the decisions were being made and how money was being used, such as the proceeds from the sale of the former A.J. McMullen Middle School. “No one wants to see any school closed,” he said. “The children did not create this situation, yet they are the ones that feel the consequences, larger class sizes, longer bus rides and the loss of stability. These concerns have been raised repeatedly, and yet we’ve received very few answers.” Under Pennsylvania law, districts cannot vote to close a school until three months after the first board meeting. If the board approves moving forward at the May 27 meeting, the followup vote would take place Sept. 1.

title: If You See This In A Dating Profile, Hit ‘Block’ Immediately — 'It's A Boundary Violation'
meta_description: The creator of the wildly popular Burned Haystack Dating Method said seeing this red flag should always be considered a no-go.
headings: to listen to the full episode for brilliant no bull dating tips to help survive the apps.
Listen to the full episode here or wherever you get your podcasts .
body_text: The apps are teeming with fake profiles, empty promises and habitual ghosters, which makes trying to find someone who is actually serious about connecting — let alone a quality match — next to impossible. So how do we partner up someone who is worthy of our amazingness? And what are some red flags that signal we should immediately hit the block button? That’s what we — Raj Punjabi and Noah Michelson, the hosts of HuffPost’s “Am I Doing It Wrong?” podcast — asked Jennie Young , the creator of the Burned Haystack Dating Method , when she recently stopped by our studio to share her secrets for successful online dating. Young, a professor at the University of Wisconsin, Green Bay, used her background in rhetoric to create her unique and wildly popular approach to dating, which is also rooted in feminist theory, in 2023. “The metaphor is that if you’re looking for a needle in a haystack, which is what everybody’s doing on the dating apps, you don’t really want to spend your life picking through every single piece of hay — that’s not only frustrating and demoralizing, but it’s just a waste of time,” Young told us. “The most efficient way to find a needle in a haystack in real life is to burn the haystack to the ground, and you just find the needles because metal doesn’t burn. So we apply that same principle to using the dating apps.” Over 266,000 women and nonbinary people have joined Young’s program since she launched it on Facebook , and countless testimonials on the page tout its life-changing dating strategies. Young also just released a book, “ Burn the Haystack: Decode Dating, Torch the Duds, and Make Room for Men Who Matter, ” about the method. One of the most popular tenets of the Burned Haystack Dating Method is “block to burn,” which urges users to block every profile that isn’t a match. “The apps will recycle people to you if you just swipe left,” she explained. “So you have to kind of take matters into your own hands and control that algorithm and block them.” Young sees finding a match as less of a targeted search for viable candidates and more of a “process of elimination.” “[Using Burned Haystack], you’re not going through Hinge or Bumble or whatever trying to find your perfect person. Your goal is to rule people out to burn that haystack, which then allows those needles to naturally emerge.” One of the biggest red flags that Young said should immediately earn a potential suitor a block is if they’re lying about their age. “Men lie about their age because they want to meet younger women — and they don’t want to get disqualified,” she told us. That doesn’t bode well for a burgeoning relationship. “It’s not just a lie, it’s a boundary violation,” Young said. “Because now, you know, let’s say there’s a woman who’s ... 30 years old and she’s set her age parameters from 29 to 39. The 49-year-old guy who comes in lying is not only lying to her, but has already decided that it’s OK to violate that boundary, which she has clearly articulated. So if the first two things that have happened in this budding relationship are lying and a boundary violation, that’s not great.” Young also finds that if someone hasn’t filled out their profile, they may not be approaching dating as intentionally as you are, and that could be a problem. “I generally do think it’s a red flag, just in that it means you’re dealing with someone who might not be taking this whole process very seriously,” she said. “If you’ve got someone who kind of hasn’t taken the time to fill out the profile or answer the most basic questions, I think that’s usually an indicator that they’re just not that serious about it. So if you’re looking for a long-term monogamous partnership, odds are that’s not going to be your person.” However, Young acknowledged this rule does have some exceptions. “This seems to be more common with men’s profiles than women’s profiles — this sort of empty profile issue,” she said. “I have talked to a number of men that I know in real life to be good people who would be good partners, and when they show me their dating app profile, I’m like, ‘This sucks! You didn’t even fill it out.’ And frequently what that reveals is not so much a lack of orientation toward partnership, but a lack of faith in the dating app process, which I mean, it’s kind of understandable.” So how do we know if we should block or engage? “What we tell people in Burned Haystack is that you use profiles to rule people out , not to rule them in ,” Young said. “So even if a profile is completely filled out, that’s still not enough information to tell you whether that person is going to be a good match for you. You just don’t know [until you meet them]. However, it’s frequently very easy to tell right away that that person is not going to be a good match for you.” That’s because the Burned Haystack Dating Method is more about finding red flags than green flags. “It seems negatively oriented, right?” Young said. “And you know what, maybe it is, but it’s also pragmatic ... It’s a logical application of a vetting process. So I would say if you come across a profile that’s not fully complete, but if there’s some stuff there you like — you know, maybe you like the pictures or maybe you like what is there — if there’s nothing that’s turning you off , I would not block that person. I would at least kind of wait and see what happens.” We also chatted with Young about what makes a killer first message, what kind of information you shouldn’t put on your profile, and lots more. Make sure to subscribe to “Am I Doing It Wrong?” on whatever podcast platform you prefer so you don’t miss a single episode from our brand-new third season. And check out some of our favorites, including how to apologize or vanquish your credit card debt ; how to find love online or overcome anxiety ; tips for online shopping , taking care of your teeth and pooping like a pro ; secrets to booking and staying in a hotel ; how to deal with an angry person ; how to make friends as an adult ; everything you need to know about protein ; getting your best workout; taking care of your car; surviving a breakup; avoiding forever chemicals , plus much more. For more from Jennie Young, visit her webpage and Instagram , and check out the Burned Haystack Dating Method page on Facebook . To check out her new book, head here . Need some help with something you’ve been doing wrong? Email us at AmIDoingItWrong@HuffPost.com , and we might investigate the topic in an upcoming episode.

title: 王骁田曦薇《低智商犯罪》热度破万，紫金陈的“改编运”又发力了？
meta_description: 影视化作品再度走热，原著作者紫金陈也出来自我调侃：“这次又又又又运气好，《低智商犯罪》播得很不错，希望能继续升温下去，这样买书的人就更多了。”尽管影视化过程中对原著有所改编，但故事框架、主要人物和现实内核都根…
body_text: 搜狐娱乐专稿（小玉/文）由王骁、田曦薇主演的《低智商犯罪》迎来超点收官，该剧站内热度峰值成功突破10000，云合市占率最高超过26%，领跑同期剧集市场。 影视化作品再度走热，原著作者紫金陈也出来自我调侃：“这次又又又又运气好，《低智商犯罪》播得很不错，希望能继续升温下去，这样买书的人就更多了。” 单看结果，紫金陈的确像个运气爆棚的“锦鲤”。但把他的几部作品摊开细看，所谓“改编运极佳”的背后，其实是故事质量与影视团队双向匹配的结果。 2017年的《无证之罪》豆瓣评分8.0，2020年的《隐秘的角落》《沉默的真相》豆瓣评分分别高达8.8和9.0，不仅口碑过硬，市场热度同样出色。尤其是后两部，评分人数均达到百万级别，称得上名副其实的大众爆款。 尽管影视化过程中对原著有所改编，但故事框架、主要人物和现实内核都根植于小说文本，这正是紫金陈本人毋庸置疑的硬实力。 这部小说走的是荒诞喜剧悬疑路线，破案全靠主角的“锦鲤”体质一路误打误撞，反派也脑回路清奇、纷纷自投罗网，全员“不太聪明”的设定制造了密集的黑色幽默和错位笑点。 在同质化愈发严重的悬疑剧市场，《低智商犯罪》这样风格独特的作品反而形成了强烈的辨识度。它不仅满足了老受众对新鲜感的渴求，也以更轻快的调性拉近了非典型悬疑用户的距离。 可以说，早期的“推理之王”系列和如今的《低智商犯罪》，影视化的时机都恰到好处，这也得益于匹配到了契合的影视化团队。 好文本常有，但能平稳落地、甚至拔高原著气质的影视化团队却非常稀缺。近几年众多大IP改编翻车，问题往往不单出在文本，而是倒在了从文字到镜头的转化过程中。剧情魔改导致原著筋骨尽失，或是团队对故事气质的理解完全错位，最终呈现出来的内容质量不佳，既消耗了IP，也消耗了观众的耐心。 紫金陈的幸运在于，每一部重要作品几乎都遇到了气质相投的创作团队，从而真正实现了互相成就。 小说影视化能持续产出精品的作者并不多，紫金陈的“改编运”也是一种好内容吸引好团队，高口碑再吸引强资源的良性循环。

title: 天安门广场挂起中美两国国旗！特朗普空中发文：此刻黄仁勋与我同乘“空军一号”，很荣幸与众多杰出人士前往伟大的中国
meta_description: 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普5月13日至15日对中国进行国事访问。13日，北京机场高速公路附近挂起中美两国国旗。特朗普在“真实社交”上驳斥了美国消费者新闻与商业频道(CNBC)关于黄仁勋未受邀参加这场由全球顶尖商界…
body_text: 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普5月13日至15日对中国进行国事访问。 13日，北京机场高速公路附近挂起中美两国国旗。 天安门广场挂起中美两国国旗。 北京时间13日上午，美国总统特朗普登上“空军一号”，启程前往中国。 还未落地的特朗普在“真实社交”发文表示， “能够与众多的杰出人士一同前往伟大的中国，是我的荣幸”。 值得一提的是， 全球市值最高的AI芯片龙头英伟达首席执行官黄仁勋也于最后时刻在阿拉斯加登上“空军一号”随特朗普一同访华。 特朗普在“真实社交”上驳斥了美国消费者新闻与商业频道(CNBC)关于黄仁勋未受邀参加这场由全球顶尖商界领袖组成的访华盛事。他说：“事实上，黄仁勋此刻正与我一同乘坐空军一号专机，除非我要求他离开（而这几乎不可能发生），否则CNBC的报道就是不实信息——用政界的话说，就是假新闻（FAKE NEWS）！”

title: 美国目前有多少中国人？把数字摊开细看后才明白：难怪很多人一听都愣住了_人口_留学生_家庭
body_text: 前几天跟朋友聊天，桌上有人随口问了一句：美国现在到底有多少中国人？原本大家都觉得，这事大概也就是“挺多”的程度，顶多几十万、上百万。结果话题越聊越不对劲，等把常见统计口径里的数字一层层摆出来，屋里先安静了几秒，接着就是同一个反应： 原来不是少，是真的很多。 这种惊讶，不是因为大家没见过世面，也不是因为对海外生活有什么滤镜。说白了，很多人平时对“在美中国人”这个概念的认识，还是停留在留学生、开中餐馆、做生意、住在几个大城市这些零碎印象里。可一旦把范围拉开，把时间线拉长，再把“华裔人口”“中国出生人口”“长期居住者”“留学生群体”这些口径区分开，事情马上就不一样了。 美国有多少中国人，表面看是在问一个数字，实际问的是一整段跨越几十年的流动史。 这个问题为什么总能引发讨论？原因不复杂。美国长期是全球最强的经济体之一，产业、教育、科研、金融、消费市场都很成熟。很多普通人对它的印象，既熟悉又陌生。熟悉，是因为影视、新闻、社交平台把这个国家反复放到眼前；陌生，是因为真正能把美国社会结构、移民结构、华人分布说清楚的人，其实并不多。于是，大多数人脑子里装着几个高频词：发达、高收入、名校、机会多。可这些词太大，落不到人身上，就容易把复杂问题看成一句空话。 把背景拉回去看，会更清楚。上世纪中后期，美国在工业、金融、科技几条线上同时发力，整个社会的物质水平和制度吸附力被迅速放大。那时不少国家还在解决温饱、基础建设、产业起步，美国已经在大规模工业化、消费社会、大学科研体系这些方面走得很深。等到后来的信息产业、互联网产业、金融服务业继续扩张，它吸引全球人口流入这件事，几乎成了一个长期趋势。 谁都想去机会更密集、回报更高、平台更大的地方试一试，这本身就是人口流动最朴素的逻辑。 放到中国人的视角里看，这种流动更容易理解。早些年，很多家庭对“出国”这件事，带着很强的上升期待。有人想要更高的收入，有人盯着教育资源，有人看中科研平台，有人是为了生意和职业发展，还有人单纯就是想换个生活方式。别把这事想得太玄，普通人的选择往往很直接：哪里更容易找到工作，哪里孩子教育更有确定性，哪里职业路径更清楚，人就往哪里流。 也正因为这个逻辑一直存在，所以美国的中国人规模，不是某一年突然冒出来的，而是 一拨一拨累积出来的 。从早年务工、经商，到后来技术移民、投资移民、留学再转长期居留，再到家庭团聚，这些路径叠在一起，数字自然不会小。很多人听到“美国有500多万华裔”时会愣住，原因就在这儿。大家平时盯着的是单个人、单条新闻、单个城市，却很少把几十年的总量变化放到一起看。 说得再直白点，很多人误以为“在美国的中国人”就是一群刚过去的人。其实不是。这里面既有近些年过去读书、工作、创业的人，也有已经在当地生活很多年的家庭，还有在美国出生长大的下一代。 所以这个数字一大，靠的不是短期爆发，靠的是持续积累。 当时间跨度足够长，人口总量就会呈现出肉眼可见的放大效果。 不少人之所以对这个规模没概念，还因为容易把几个不同概念混成一团。比如“华裔人口”，指的是具有华人血统、文化背景或家族来源与中国相关的人群；“中国出生人口”，更强调出生地；“中国留学生”，则只是其中一个阶段性的流动群体。把这些词混着用，数字听起来就会忽大忽小，越听越乱。真正一拆开，反倒能看明白： 美国的中国相关人口，不是单线条构成，而是多层叠加。 留学是最容易被看见的一层。很多家庭一提美国华人，脑子里第一个冒出来的就是留学生。这个印象没错，但只对了一部分。美国大学体系成熟，科研平台厚，专业分工细，学术资源和产业衔接也更紧。这些年，哪怕环境有波动，哪怕选择更加分散，美国在高等教育和科研上的吸引力依旧不弱。尤其是在理工科、商科、医学院相关方向，很多家庭和学生还是会把它列进重点考虑范围。 问题在于，很多人把“留学生很多”直接等同于“在美中国人很多”，这就有点只看树叶不看树林了。留学生只是流动中的一个入口。有人毕业后回国，有人留下工作，有人再进入长期居留通道，有人组建家庭。也就是说， 留学本身不是终点，它只是人口结构变化的一个起点。 把这个逻辑看明白，再回头看那些数字，就不会觉得它们像天上掉下来的一样。 除了教育，职业机会也是非常现实的一根线。美国的高科技、金融、医疗、工程、法律、会计、咨询、贸易这些领域，长期对高学历和专业型人才有吸附力。很多中国人过去后，并不是靠所谓“神话”生活，而是靠学历、职业技能、加班能力、适应能力，一步步在当地站住脚。外人看见的是“有房有车、收入不错”，没看见的是前面那段很长的爬坡期。 任何地方都没有轻松的中产，只有不同版本的辛苦。 聊到这里，经常有人会问：那在美国的中国人是不是都过得挺好？这个问题，真不能一句话回答。有人过得顺，职业清晰、收入稳定、家庭结构也稳，日子确实过得体面。有人收入不低，精神压力却很大，房贷、教育、医疗、职业竞争、身份焦虑一个都不少。还有人卡在中间地带，表面看光鲜，实际并不轻松。很多时候，别人看到的是结果，看不到过程；看到的是城市中心的样子，看不到通勤、税费、账单、育儿和养老的压力。 更现实的一点是，华人在美国并不是一个同质化群体。有人是第一代移民，有人是第二代、第三代；有人在大城市从事专业工作，有人在小城做生意、开店、跑物流、做服务业；有人受教育程度很高，也有人靠手艺、靠勤奋吃饭。 把几百万人的生活压缩成“幸福”或“受苦”两个词，本身就不准确。 这也是很多讨论一上来就容易跑偏的地方。 有些人会用“美国有歧视，所以去那边不值得”来下结论，也有人会用“美国机会多，所以过去就是更好的选择”来概括。这两种说法都太省事了。现实从来不是单色的。华人在美国的确可能面对偏见、文化隔阂、职业天花板这些问题，也的确有人凭本事、勤奋和资源整合能力，在当地过上了不错的生活。这两个事实可以同时存在，谁也不必替代谁。 成年人看问题，最怕的不是复杂，最怕的是把复杂硬说成简单。 到了2026年，再回头看这个话题，真正值得注意的，不只是“美国到底有多少中国人”，而是大家对这个数字的想象还停在过去。很多人潜意识里仍然把“去美国”看成一个单向度的上升故事，或者一个单向度的失望故事。其实都不对。今天的人口流动，已经没那么脸谱化了。有人出去，又回来；有人短期停留，最后转向别的国家或地区；有人在国内找到更适合自己的赛道，根本不再把出国当成唯一选择。 路变多了，心态也变了。 这一点，跟中国这几年的变化关系很大。国内产业升级更快，城市生活配套更完整，创业环境、就业方向、教育供给都在持续变化。很多过去只能在国外寻找的资源，现在国内也能接住一部分。尤其是在互联网、制造业升级、新能源、人工智能应用、供应链、数字消费这些领域，年轻人能看到的新机会，已经和过去不是一个量级。于是，今天再谈“美国有多少中国人”，意义早就不只是羡慕和惊叹，更像是在看一面镜子： 全球流动还在继续，但中国人的选择空间已经明显变宽。 说白了，前些年很多家庭把出国视作稀缺通道，是因为可替代选项不多。现在不一样了。有人依然会去美国读书、做研究、找工作，这很正常；也有人算完账、比完机会后，发现国内反而更适合长期发展，这也很正常。关键不是把哪条路神化，而是看这条路适不适合自己。对普通家庭来说，最怕的是把别人成功的样子，当成自己必须照搬的人生答案。 回到那个最让人吃惊的数字上。为什么“500多万”会让很多人听完发愣？因为它打破了很多人的直觉。大家平时接触的信息是碎片化的，看到一个留学生、一个博主、一个华人商圈、一个华人社区，就以为这已经是全部。其实那只是局部切片。真把总量摆在眼前，你会发现，美国社会里的华人存在感，早已不是“少量分布”，而是 在多个行业、多个城市、多个世代里持续存在。 再往深一点看，这个数字还有另一层提醒。人口流动从来不是单纯的地理移动，它背后连着教育选择、职业分工、财富配置、家庭结构、文化适应和身份认同。一个人走出去，不只是换了个地址，往往也换了一套生活成本、一套竞争方式、一套人际规则。很多人只盯着表面的收入和居住环境，却忽略了更底层的事：你是不是适应那套节奏？你能不能接受那套规则？你愿不愿意承担那种长期的不确定性？这些问题，比“去不去”更重要。 这也是为什么，围绕“美国有多少中国人”的讨论，总会自然延伸到另一个层面：到底是什么在推动人流动？答案看着复杂，骨子里却很朴素。无非就是教育、工作、收入、家庭、下一代、个人发展空间。你看，绕来绕去，还是普通人的那几件大事。 所谓大时代，最后落实到每个人身上，还是读书、找工作、成家、养老这些具体问题。 从这个角度看，美国的中国人多，并不奇怪。真正值得认真琢磨的是，为什么会多，后来又为什么还在变化。前者说明全球资源的吸引力确实存在，后者说明中国自身的发展也在改变人们的判断。今天的中国家庭，对教育和职业路径的计算比以前更细了，对风险的感受也更具体了。以前听见“去美国”三个字，很多人会下意识觉得那是更高级的选项；现在再听，很多人第一反应是先问一句：适合什么样的人？值不值？长期成本如何？孩子以后怎么办？这就成熟多了。 我们把话说得接地气一点。过去有人觉得，去美国像是把人生切到“高配模式”；现在越来越多人明白，哪有什么统一的高配，只有适不适配。有人在那边如鱼得水，有人在国内跑得更快。有人适合大平台和国际化分工，有人适合熟悉的文化环境和更近的家庭支持。路没有高低，只有代价和回报的匹配程度。 真正稳的决定，不是听别人讲传奇，而是把自己的账算清楚。 所以，回到开头那个问题，美国目前有多少中国人？从近年的常见统计口径看，这早已是一个 数百万级 的存在，放到现实生活里，就是一个庞大、复杂、层次分明、仍在变化中的群体。这个答案之所以让很多人不敢相信，不是数字夸张，而是它逼着人承认一件事：过去几十年里，中国人与美国之间的人口流动，远比我们日常感受到的更深、更广，也更真实。 更有意思的是，当这个数字摆在眼前，很多人的情绪也在变。以前是单纯震惊，接着是羡慕、争论、贴标签。到了现在，越来越多人开始换个角度看： 不是别人去了哪里，而是自己该把人生放在哪里。 这才是这个话题最落地的部分。数字会让人愣一下，想明白的人，往往会继续往下问：规模这么大，背后到底藏着怎样的选择成本、家庭账本和人生分岔路？ 你看到“美国有这么多中国人”这个数字时，最先冒出来的念头是什么：吃惊、理解，还是会重新想想，普通家庭到底该怎么判断一条路值不值得走？ 返回搜狐，查看更多

headings: Staigle’s Steakhouse team bringing new dining experience to Ocean Springs
body_text: OCEAN SPRINGS, Miss. (WXXV)- A new restaurant and speakeasy is opening in Ocean Springs, offering French-Cajun cuisine and craft cocktails. The team behind Staigle’s Steakhouse in Wiggins is bringing its first Coast concept to the Roost Hotel. The restaurant is called Maringouin. The unique business will have a locally inspired menu, Cajun cuisine with a touch of global inspired spices, a full-service bar, and a hidden speakeasy for a more intimate setting. The restaurant will also cater to hotel guests, offering service through the property. Maringouin will officially be open for business starting this Friday.

title: বিজয় দিবসে চালু শাহজালালের তৃতীয় টার্মিনাল | | বাংলাদেশ প্রতিদিন
meta_description: বিজয় দিবসে চালু শাহজালালের তৃতীয় টার্মিনাল
body_text: মহান বিজয় দিবস সামনে রেখে শাহজালাল আন্তর্জাতিক বিমানবন্দরের তৃতীয় টার্মিনাল চালুর লক্ষ্যে প্রস্তুতি জোরদার করা হয়েছে বলে জানিয়েছেন বেসামরিক বিমান পরিবহন ও পর্যটন প্রতিমন্ত্রী এম রশিদুজ্জামান মিল্লাত। তিনি বলেছেন, সম্ভাব্য উদ্বোধনের তারিখ হিসেবে ১৬ ডিসেম্বরকে বিবেচনায় রেখে সংশ্লিষ্ট সব প্রস্তুতি সম্পন্ন করার নির্দেশ দেওয়া হয়েছে। মন্ত্রণালয়ের সম্মেলনকক্ষে অনুষ্ঠিত ‘হযরত শাহজালাল আন্তর্জাতিক বিমানবন্দরের তৃতীয় টার্মিনাল অপারেশন অ্যান্ড মেইন্টেন্যান্স’ শীর্ষক উচ্চপর্যায়ের পর্যালোচনা সভায় তিনি এসব কথা বলেন। সভায় যাত্রীসেবার মানোন্নয়নে বিমানের পাশাপাশি দ্বিতীয় গ্রাউন্ড হ্যান্ডলার নিয়োগের সিদ্ধান্ত নেওয়া হয়েছে। এ বিষয়ে আইএফসি, সিএএবি ও বিমানের সঙ্গে আলোচনা করে সর্বসম্মতিক্রমে সিদ্ধান্ত হয় বলে জানানো হয়। টার্মিনাল চালুর সঙ্গে সমন্বয় রেখে গ্রাউন্ড হ্যান্ডলার নিয়োগ কার্যক্রমও এগিয়ে নেওয়া হচ্ছে। এ ছাড়া কনসেশন অ্যাগ্রিমেন্ট স্বাক্ষরের মাধ্যমে তৃতীয় টার্মিনালের অপারেশন কার্যক্রম চালুর সম্ভাব্য সময়সীমা উপস্থাপন করা হলে সংশ্লিষ্ট কর্মকর্তাদের দ্রুত চুক্তি সম্পন্ন করার নির্দেশ দেওয়া হয়। সভায় আরও জানানো হয়, অপারেশনাল রেডিনেস অ্যান্ড এয়ারপোর্ট ট্রান্সফার (ওআরএটি) কার্যক্রম আগামী জুনের মধ্যে শুরু করতে জাপানিজ ওয়ার্কিং গ্রুপকে অনুরোধ করা হয়েছে। যাতে নির্ধারিত সময়সীমার মধ্যেই তৃতীয় টার্মিনাল চালু করা সম্ভব হয়।

title: Estudiante de Psicología se retira a tan solo tres preguntas del gran premio en QQSM | Teletica
meta_description: La concursante ya sabe en qué va a invertir su dinero.
headings: Estudiante de Psicología se retira a tan solo tres preguntas del gran premio en QQSM
La concursante ya sabe en qué va a invertir su dinero.
body_text: Una abogada y una joven estudiante mostraron sus conocimientos en ¿Quién quiere ser millonario? (QQSM). La última estuvo a tan solo tres preguntas del gran premio de ₡ 35 millones. Yesenia Vásquez fue la primera en participar; la abogada de profesión aseguró que usará el dinero para viajar con sus hijos. “El género que más me llama la atención es la literatura griega, me apasiona. He tenido la oportunidad de viajar a esos lugares, entonces me he sentido como si estuviera en ese tiempo. Mi familia no sabía que yo venía para acá, fue sorpresa, nadie se imaginaba que yo a escondidas estaba haciendo esto, siempre que veo el programa les decía que yo me sabía las preguntas”, contó la vecina de La Fortuna de San Carlos. Vásquez estuvo cerca de alcanzar la segunda zona segura de ₡ 3.5 millones, pero al no estar segura de la respuesta y quedarse sin comodines, decidió retirarse con sus ₡2 .5 millones. La pregunta que dejó en el camino a la abogada fue la siguiente: La primera planta eólica de América Latina se construyó en A: Orosí B: Bagaces C: Santa Ana D: Tilarán (respuesta correcta) Fiorella Hidalgo Ballestero fue la segunda jugadora de la noche. Esta joven de apenas 19 años demostró que tiene gran talento y un futuro prometedor, al llevarse ₡ 6 millones. “Me encanta mucho lo que es el arte; todos los días me dedico a hacer velas artesanales. También amo leer y aprender”, relató la vecina de Sabanilla de Montes de Oca. La estudiante de Psicología ya sabe en qué va a invertir su dinero: será en su proyecto personal y profesional. “Me encantaría financiar mi proyecto de aromaterapia con las velas enfocado en Psicología. para ayudar a las personas, me gustaría invertir el dinero en este proyecto”, explicó la también estudiante de Sociología. Hidalgo llegó hasta la pregunta 12; si contestaba correctamente, se ganaba ₡ 9 millones, pero si perdía, se devolvía a la segunda zona segura de ₡ 3.5 millones. La joven no estaba segura y no quería arriesgarse, así que tomó una sabia decisión al retirarse con sus ₡ 6 millones. La pregunta que no contestó fue la siguiente: El costarricense Isidro Con Wong fue un destacado: A: Compositor B: Director de cine C: Poeta D: Artista plástico ( respuest a correcta) Recuerde que puede ver ¿Quién quiere ser millonario? los martes de 8 p. m. a 9 p. m., a través de Teletica.com , TDMAX y Teletica Canal 7. Si usted desea ver los programas de esta nueva temporada, lo puede hacer ingresando en este enlace . literatura griega participante yesenia vásquez proyecto velas aromaterapia fiorella hidalgo

title: Digital Financial Participation Systems: Probability, Variance, and Risk Evaluation
meta_description: Free classified website without registration and instant approval for USA, UK, India. No Registration is required and no activation/confirmation email is required. High traffic web site that allows visitors to place a classified ads for USA, UK, India, etc
body_text: Advanced digital finance platforms supporting probability-based participation are designed around encryption protocols, identity authentication, and real-time transactional integrity. From a financial perspective, these systems are evaluated using expected utility theory, probability modeling, and behavioral risk assessment frameworks.

title: 森林中的45米景观塔，这干净的结构太美了！
body_text: 位于丹麦的「营地冒险公园(Camp Adventure Park)」，是当地保护完好的森林 Gisselfeld klosters Skove 中提供给人们使用的公园，距离哥本哈根南部大约一个小时的车程。 在一片森林之中，你能看到一座螺旋式的景观塔，它有着沙漏形状的结构，并且设置了一道螺旋坡道 ▼ 这座景观塔高约 45 米，人们爬上这座塔能看到周围 360 度的自然景观，包括树木、丘陵、湖泊和草地 ▼ EFFEKT 成立于 2007 年，包含创始人 Tue Foged 和 Sinus Lynge 在内，公司已有 40 多名的员工，主要专注于建筑、城市规划和研究领域的业务 ▼ 在接到这个项目之后，建筑师要解决的最关键问题就是： 要如何在保护森林的同时，让它更容易被公众所接触？ 因此项目的整体规划中，有两个最关键的部分，分别是 一条长 900 米的树梢步道，以及那座 45 米高的景观塔 ，两者连接起来形成一个全新且独特的体验场所。 穿过树林的道路通过不同种的类型来保证能轻柔且敏感地通过，同时还能最大程度上地减少对环境的干扰 ▼ 步道有高低之分，较高的人行道穿过森林最古老的部分，塔楼和较低的步道则位于较年轻的区域。较高的人行道还为不同的群体提供一系列活动空间 ▼ 并且，景观台设置的 螺旋斜坡道 可以保证几乎所有的游客都能更轻易的登上景观台，而且每一层都有 360 度的景观视角 ▼ 景观塔本身的 120 度旋转造就了它的结构 ，并且因此可以使用全直的结构元件，从而产生坚硬、有效而且视觉上非常醒目的结构 ▼ 整个塔的结构材料使用的是钢材，而且将其的锈迹保持下来，有着别样美感。 另外在塔的正中间也还留有高达的树木，置身其中有着非常特别的体验 ▼ 走道则是由当地采购的橡木板制成，使其可以与周围的树林环境融为一体。 整个坡道的倾斜程度也非常温和，轮椅和婴儿车都可以方便的上去 ▼ 这栋塔楼的顶层平台海拔 135 米，可以说是当地的最高点，而且在晴朗的日子里，还能看到背面的哥本哈根和马尔默。 这个项目所包含的树梢步道和景观塔，已经是营地冒险公园的一部分，人们对这个景观台也非常喜爱。

title: 重庆官场 一张“死亡合照”疯传
meta_description: 中共重庆官场持续震荡。继重庆市长胡衡华、市委常委罗蔺落马，官方指重庆副市长、公安局长张安疆“病亡”，但网络盛传其跳楼身亡。重庆市委书记袁家军也被指高危，一张“死亡合照”在网上流传。
body_text: 中共重庆官场持续震荡。示意图：2025年3月4日， 北京 大会堂内的安全人员。(Pedro Pardo/AFP via Getty Images) 中共重庆官场持续震荡。继重庆市长胡衡华、市委常委罗蔺落马，官方指重庆副市长、公安局长张安疆“病亡”，但网络盛传其跳楼身亡。重庆市委书记袁家军也被指高危，一张“死亡合照”在网上流传。 5月8日，在任上落马一年半后，中共重庆市委前常委、政法委书记陆克华被判死缓，其被指受贿逾1.89亿元（人民币，下同）。 前一天（7日），重庆官方消息指，副市长、市公安局党委书记、局长张安疆因“突发疾病”去世。但网络盛传张安疆是跳楼死亡。 此前，今年3月20日，重庆市委副书记、市长胡衡华任上被查；4月17日，重庆市委常委、两江新区区委书记罗蔺落马。 评论人士佐藤鹏5月9日在X上发文称，袁家军的处境现在越来越凶险了，总理 李强 可能已经保不了他了，军工贪腐案 马兴瑞 替袁家军挡了一刀，袁侥幸过关，但不成想袁又卷进了三安光电行贿案。 佐藤鹏贴出一张照片，显示2023年福建三安光电联合意法半导体投资70亿元，在重庆进行8英寸碳化硅（SiC）器件大规模量产，当年6月8日，重庆书记袁家军与市长胡衡华以及副市长江敦涛、重庆两江新区书记罗蔺、公安局长张安疆，三安集团董事长林秀成、三安光电董事长林志强、总经理林科闯，以及意法半导体相关高管在重庆进行了签约仪式。 多家大陆媒体曾报导了这一官方消息。当时出席签约仪式的高官中，胡衡华、江敦涛、罗蔺都已落马，而张安疆也蹊跷死亡。而三安的林秀成和女婿林科闯在3月和4月先后被抓。 佐藤鹏表示，胡衡华落马不仅跟三安光电的行贿案有关，传言林秀成为让重庆的70亿人民币项目能顺利签约落地，让女婿林科闯向重庆市委的主要领导进了行贿，而且是用不易查到的加密货币泰达币，胡衡华据传收了3,000多万泰达币（USDT），1泰达币相当于1美元，而江敦涛与罗蔺、张安疆三人也各自收了近千万的泰达币，至于袁家军收了多少因为其还没有落马暂时还不知道，但参考胡衡华都能给3,000多万泰达币，袁家军至少得翻倍。三安的林秀成和林科闯已在今年双双遭到了留置，这也说明三安光电的案子很大、事很重。 财新网4月29日引述消息称，重庆静升律师事务所创始合伙人、主任彭静4月19日被有关部门带走，疑与胡衡华、陆克华、江敦涛案有关。 据称，在胡衡华案中，林秀成的女婿林科闯给了胡衡华3,080万USDT（约值2.1亿元人民币，其中1,000万是置换手续费）。在胡衡华被查后，冷钱包被控制，有关部门又查到林科闯持有的另外六个冷钱包的资金流向；其中与胡衡华同时转账的一笔1,550万USDT，据林科闯称转给了罗蔺。

title: New details released on planned amphitheater on the Chattanooga Westside - WDEF
meta_description: Image of the planned amphitheater along with the rest of The Bend. (Courtesy: Urban Story Ventures) CHATTANOOGA, Tenn. (WDEF)- Last week, we learned that plans were in the works for a large amphitheater on the Chattanooga Westside at The Bend. Tuesday, we are learning more about what that entails. Urban Story Ventures has revealed that the proposed 12,500 seat venue...
headings: New details released on planned amphitheater on the Chattanooga Westside
body_text: Image of the planned amphitheater along with the rest of The Bend. (Courtesy: Urban Story Ventures) CHATTANOOGA, Tenn. (WDEF)- Last week, we learned that plans were in the works for a large amphitheater on the Chattanooga Westside at The Bend. Tuesday, we are learning more about what that entails. Urban Story Ventures has revealed that the proposed 12,500 seat venue is to be built by Colorado based Venu Holding Corporation . This will be their fifth Sunset Amphitheater called “Sunset Amphitheater Chattanooga”, as the company says this will be their flagship location in the Eastern United States. The other four are currently under construction in Dallas, Houston, El Paso, and Tulsa, as the company just opened up a new award-winning amphitheater in the company’s headquarter city of Colorado Springs. The facility will feature a canopied roof allowing the venue to be partially enclosed and open air, and will face Lookout Mountain. It will also feature traditional bowl and lawn seating along with premium spaces . Urban Story Ventures CEO Jimmy White describes it as, “First class theater, the most technologically advanced on the East Coast. It’s gonna be right here in Chattanooga so it’s really exciting… Chattanooga was a strategic market because we’re regional, but they’re building a whole East Coast tour with Jacksonville, Chattanooga, and other markets all the way through the northeast.” We have heard some ask why existing sports venues such as Finley Stadium and Erlanger Park are not being used for more concerts. The last major concert at Finley Stadium was a performance by Kane Brown in 2022, and the new baseball park has not yet hosted a concert through its first few weeks of operation. AT&T Field during its existence was not a draw for a concerts either, as White says the economics of musical tours dictate that venues be designed specifically for music. He said, “It’s just not conducive for great acoustics and especially in today’s environment when you know everything is AI, you got these LED panel screens and immersive experiences, sporting events are just not built that way right now. It’s amazing the technology that will exist here at this amphitheater. Just to set up a stage at a Finley Stadium for example is $150,000 for a random show.” The need for an amphitheater in Chattanooga has been discussed for years, as a Chattanooga Tourism Study found over three-fourths of concerts attended by Chattanoogans were in other cities. White believes this will keep much of those dollars here, generating over four billion dollars in economic impact. White said, “Amphitheaters are popular. We’re missing about 32 tour buses a week right now, they’re bypassing Chattanooga. Think about all of the acts we’re missing because they’re going to Atlanta, Birmingham, and all of these acts that just drive through our market and don’t stop here.” He says the cost of the project will be $300 million dollars, most of that being funded through private investments with talks about potential incentives from the city, county, and state levels. The Bend is already a tax increment financing district, and White says they do not plan to pursue property tax breaks in these negotiations. He expects for groundbreaking to occur in the first quarter of 2027, with construction lasting 12-18 months, meaning concerts could begin as early as 2028. White also said the amphitheater would be next to a marina and connected with a retail area called the Canal District, and says more announcements regarding The Bend are coming soon.

title: NBI yet to confirm if dela Rosa has already left Senate premises
meta_description: Sen. Ronald “Bato” dela Rosa emerges from a six-month absence and appears in the Senate. He shows hand injuries he said he sustained after “wrestling” his way into the Senate building on
body_text: MANILA, Philippines — National Bureau of Investigation (NBI) Director Melvin Matibag said they have yet to confirm if Sen. Ronald “Bato” dela Rosa has already left the Senate building. Matibag said this in a Palace press briefing on Thursday, following a report that dela Rosa left the Senate premises at 2:30 a.m. “We have yet to validate what the report is. Maybe it would be good for us to ask the Senate, the Office of the Secretary, and the OSAA [Office of the Sergeant-at-Arms] as well, because they will be the ones who can really see if there is an actual exit or departure of Sen. Bato,” Matibag said. “We also hope that the news we hear will be released on social media,” he added. /apl

headings: Community rallies around family of Gulfport man following accident at Flint Creek
body_text: GULFPORT, Miss. (WXXV)- A Gulfport family is continuing to mourn the sudden loss of Jacob Nitkiewicz, who passed away in the tragic accident that took place at Flint Creek over the weekend. Nitkiewicz, a husband and father, died early Saturday morning, leaving behind his wife and daughter. Now, loved ones are rallying around the family as they face the difficult road ahead. A family friend has organized a GoFundMe to help support them in the coming months. So far, donors have raised nearly $6,000, already more than half of the fundraising goal. title: He owned Bitcoin and Ethereum, but this coin made him rich: Ripple ex-CTO’s crypto strategy decoded | Mint
meta_description: Ripple's former CTO, David Schwartz, has revealed that XRP significantly increased his wealth compared to Bitcoin and Ethereum. He once held 26 million XRP, which peaked at $3.65, while he regrets selling Ethereum too early.
headings: He owned Bitcoin and Ethereum, but this coin made him rich: Ripple ex-CTO’s crypto strategy decoded

Ripple's former CTO, David Schwartz, has revealed that XRP significantly increased his wealth compared to Bitcoin and Ethereum. He once held 26 million XRP, which peaked at $3.65, while he regrets selling Ethereum too early.

title: হজের যেসব দোয়া জানা জরুরি
headings: ৪. তাওয়াফ শেষে মাকামে ইবরাহিমে পড়ার দোয়া
body_text: হজ মূলত মহান আল্লাহর সঙ্গে বান্দার এক নিবিড় আধ্যাত্মিক সংযোগের মাধ্যম। হজের প্রতিটি ধাপ—ইহরাম বাঁধা, কাবা শরিফ তাওয়াফ, সাফা-মারওয়া সায়ি ও আরাফাতের ময়দানে অবস্থান—সবকিছুই নির্দিষ্ট দোয়া ও জিকিরের মাধ্যমে পূর্ণতা পায়। হজের সফরকে অর্থবহ ও পুণ্যময় করতে গুরুত্বপূর্ণ কিছু দোয়া অর্থসহ জেনে নেওয়া প্রয়োজন। ইহরাম বাঁধার পর থেকে হজের মূল কার্যাবলি শুরু হওয়া পর্যন্ত এই তালবিয়া বেশি বেশি পাঠ করা সুন্নত। আরবি: لَبَّيْكَ اللَّهُمَّ لَبَّيْكَ، لَبَّيْكَ لَا شَرِيكَ لَكَ لَبَّيْكَ، إِنَّ الْحَمْدَ وَالنِّعْمَةَ لَكَ وَالْمُلْكَ، لَا شَرِيكَ لَكَ উচ্চারণ: লাব্বাইকাল্লাহুম্মা লাব্বাইক, লাব্বাইকা লা শারীকা লাকা লাব্বাইক, ইন্নাল হামদা ওয়ান নি‘মাতা লাকা ওয়াল মুলক, লা শারীকা লাক। অর্থ: আমি হাজির হে আল্লাহ, আমি হাজির। তোমার কোনো শরিক নেই, আমি হাজির। নিশ্চয়ই সমস্ত প্রশংসা, নিয়ামত ও রাজত্ব তোমারই, তোমার কোনো শরিক নেই। পবিত্র কাবা প্রাঙ্গণে প্রথম কদম রাখার সময় এই দোয়া পাঠ করতে হয়। আরবি: بِسْمِ اللهِ وَالصَّلَاةُ وَالسَّلَامُ عَلَى رَسُولِ اللهِ، اللَّهُمَّ افْتَحْ لِي أَبْوَابَ رَحْمَتِكَ উচ্চারণ: বিসমিল্লাহি ওয়াস সালাতু ওয়াস সালামু আলা রাসূলিল্লাহ, আল্লাহুম্মাফতাহ লী আবওয়াবা রাহমাতিক। অর্থ: আল্লাহর নামে (প্রবেশ করছি), আল্লাহর রাসুলের ওপর দরুদ ও সালাম। হে আল্লাহ, আমার জন্য তোমার রহমতের দরজা খুলে দাও। তাওয়াফ করার সময় নির্দিষ্ট কোনো দোয়া বাধ্যতামূলক না হলেও রুকনে ইয়ামানি ও হাজরে আসওয়াদের মাঝখানে এই দোয়া পড়া অত্যন্ত ফজিলতপূর্ণ। আরবি: رَبَّنَا آتِنَا فِي الدُّنْيَا حَسَنَةً وَفِي الْآخِرَةِ حَسَنَةً وَقِنَا عَذَابَ النَّارِ উচ্চারণ: রাব্বানা আতিনা ফিদ্দুনিয়া হাসানাহ, ওয়া ফিল আখিরাতি হাসানাহ, ওয়া ক্বিনা আযাবান্নার। অর্থ: হে আমাদের রব, আমাদের দুনিয়াতে কল্যাণ দাও, আখিরাতেও কল্যাণ দাও এবং জাহান্নামের আজাব থেকে রক্ষা করো। তাওয়াফ সম্পন্ন করার পর মাকামে ইবরাহিমের পেছনে দুই রাকাত নামাজ পড়ার আগে এই আয়াত পাঠ করা সুন্নত। আরবি: وَاتَّخِذُوا مِنْ مَقَامِ إِبْرَاهِيمَ مُصَلًّى উচ্চারণ: ওয়াত্তাখিজু মিম মাক্বামি ইবরাহিমা মুসাল্লা। অর্থ: তোমরা মাকামে ইবরাহিমকে নামাজের স্থান হিসেবে গ্রহণ করো। সাফা ও মারওয়া পাহাড়ের মাঝে দৌড়ানো বা সায়ি শুরু করার সময় সাফা পাহাড়ে উঠে কাবার দিকে মুখ করে এটি বলতে হয়। আরবি: إِنَّ الصَّفَا وَالْمَرْوَةَ مِنْ شَعَائِرِ اللَّهِ، أَبْدَأُ بِمَا بَدَأَ اللَّهُ بِهِ উচ্চারণ: ইন্নাস সাফা ওয়াল মারওয়াতা মিন শাআয়িরিল্লাহ, আবদাউ বিমা বাদাআল্লাহু বিহি। অর্থ: নিশ্চয়ই সাফা ও মারওয়া আল্লাহর নিদর্শনসমূহের অন্তর্ভুক্ত। আমি সেটা দিয়ে শুরু করছি, যা দিয়ে আল্লাহ শুরু করেছেন। সায়ির সময় পাহাড়ের চূড়ায় উঠে এই জিকির পাঠ করা হয়। لَا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَحْدَهُ لَا شَرِيكَ لَهُ، لَهُ الْمُلْكُ وَلَهُ الْحَمْدُ يُحْيِي وَيُمِيتُ وَهُوَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ. لَا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَحْدَهُ، أَنْجَزَ وَعْدَهُ، وَنَصَرَ عَبْدَهُ، وَهَزَمَ الْأَحْزَابَ وَحْدَهُ. উচ্চারণ: লা ইলাহা ইল্লাল্লাহু ওয়াহদাহু লা শারিকা লাহু, লাহুল মুলকু ওয়া লাহুল হামদু ইউহয়ি ওয়া ইউমিতু ওয়া হুয়া আলা কুল্লি শাইয়িং কাদির। লা ইলাহা ইল্লাল্লাহু ওয়াহদাহু আনজাযা ওয়াদাহু ওয়া নাসারা আবদাহু ওয়া হাযামাল আহযাবা ওয়াহদাহু। অর্থ: আল্লাহ ছাড়া কোনো ইলাহ নেই। তিনি একক, তাঁর কোনো শরিক নেই। রাজত্ব ও প্রশংসা তাঁরই। তিনি জীবন দেন ও মৃত্যু দেন এবং সবকিছুর ওপর ক্ষমতাবান। তিনি তাঁর ওয়াদা পূর্ণ করেছেন, তাঁর বান্দাকে সাহায্য করেছেন এবং একাই সব দলকে পরাজিত করেছেন। ৯ জিলহজ আরাফাতের ময়দানে অবস্থানের সময় নবীজি (সা.) এই দোয়া বেশি বেশি পড়তেন। আরবি: لَا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَحْدَهُ لَا شَرِيكَ لَهُ، لَهُ الْمُلْكُ وَلَهُ الْحَمْدُ، وَهُوَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ উচ্চারণ: লা ইলাহা ইল্লাল্লাহু ওয়াহদাহু লা শারিকা লাহু, লাহুল মুলকু ওয়া লাহুল হামদু, ওয়া হুয়া আলা কুল্লি শাইয়িং কাদির। অর্থ: আল্লাহ ছাড়া কোনো ইলাহ নেই। তিনি একক, তাঁর কোনো শরিক নেই। রাজত্ব ও প্রশংসা তাঁরই এবং তিনি সবকিছুর ওপর ক্ষমতাবান। ৯ জিলহজ ফজর থেকে ১৩ জিলহজ আসর পর্যন্ত প্রতিটি ফরজ নামাজের পর এই তাকবির পড়া ওয়াজিব। আরবি: اللَّهُ أَكْبَرُ، اللَّهُ أَكْبَرُ، لَا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ، وَاللَّهُ أَكْبَرُ، اللَّهُ أَكْبَرُ، وَلِلَّهِ الْحَمْدُ উচ্চারণ: আল্লাহু আকবার, আল্লাহু আকবার, লা ইলাহা ইল্লাল্লাহু, ওয়াল্লাহু আকবার, আল্লাহু আকবার, ওয়ালিল্লাহিল হামদ। অর্থ: আল্লাহ মহান। আল্লাহ মহান। আল্লাহ ছাড়া কোনো ইলাহ নেই। আল্লাহ মহান। আল্লাহ মহান। সমস্ত প্রশংসা আল্লাহরই। মিনায় শয়তানের দিকে (জামারায়) প্রতিটি পাথর ছুড়ে দেওয়ার সময় উচ্চস্বরে এটি বলতে হয়। হজ বা ওমরাহ শেষে অথবা নিয়মিত নামাজ শেষে মসজিদে হারাম থেকে বের হওয়ার সময় এই দোয়া পড়া সুন্নত। আরবি: بِسْمِ اللهِ وَالصَّلَاةُ وَالسَّلَامُ عَلَى رَسُولِ اللهِ، اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ مِنْ فَضْلِكَ উচ্চারণ: বিসমিল্লাহি ওয়াস সালাতু ওয়াস সালামু আলা রাসূলিল্লাহ, আল্লাহুম্মা ইন্নী আসআলুকা মিন ফাদলিক। অর্থ: আল্লাহর নামে (বের হচ্ছি), আল্লাহর রাসুলের ওপর দরুদ ও সালাম। হে আল্লাহ, আমি তোমার অনুগ্রহ প্রার্থনা করছি। একজন মুমিনের জন্য নামাজ হলো আধ্যাত্মিক প্রশান্তি ও জীবনের বরকত লাভের সর্বোত্তম মাধ্যম। প্রতিদিন সময়মতো নামাজ আদায় করা প্রতিটি মুসলমানের ওপর ফরজ। নিচে ঢাকা ও তার পার্শ্ববর্তী এলাকার জন্য আজকের নামাজের সময়সূচি তুলে ধরা হলো। সৌদি আরবের ঐতিহ্যবাহী বাদশাহ আবদুল আজিজ আন্তর্জাতিক পবিত্র কোরআন হিফজ, তিলাওয়াত ও তাফসির প্রতিযোগিতায় যুক্ত হতে যাচ্ছে এক নতুন অধ্যায়। ইতিহাসে এবারই প্রথমবারের মতো এই আন্তর্জাতিক আসরে চালু হচ্ছে পৃথক নারী বিভাগ। হজ ইসলামের একটি মৌলিক স্তম্ভ, যা প্রত্যেক সামর্থ্যবান মুসলিমের ওপর জীবনে একবার পালন করা ফরজ। পবিত্র কোরআনের বিভিন্ন আয়াতে আল্লাহ তাআলা হজের বিধান, গুরুত্ব ও করণীয় সম্পর্কে বিস্তারিত আলোচনা করেছেন। মানুষের দৈনন্দিন জীবনের গুরুত্বপূর্ণ একটি অংশ হলো বাজার। প্রয়োজন মেটাতে, জীবিকা উপার্জন করতে কিংবা নিত্যপণ্য কিনতে প্রতিদিন অসংখ্য মানুষ বাজারে যাতায়াত করেন। বাজারে প্রবেশের সময় নবীজি (সা.) একটি সুন্দর দোয়া শিখিয়েছেন, যা পাঠ করলে মানুষ বিপুল সওয়াবের অধিকারী হতে পারে।

title: 云南维他源生物申请高效催化25-羟基维生素D3合成的羟化酶突变体专利，酶在有机溶剂中的稳定性、耐受性和酶活力得到大幅度提高_投资_企业_查大
body_text: 国家知识产权局信息显示，云南维他源生物科技有限公司申请一项名为“在有机溶剂中高效催化25-羟基维生素D3合成的羟化酶突变体和应用”的专利，公开号CN121203984A，申请日期为2025年9月。 专利摘要显示，本发明涉及基因工程领域，具体涉及一种在有机溶剂中高效催化25‑羟基维生素D3合成的羟化酶突变体和应用。本发明以SEQ ID NO.1所示的羟化酶P450‑Su1为模板，通过单位点或双位点的氨基酸突变得到4个突变体S82A、Q93L、D222N、G164A/V277L。这4个突变体与其野生型羟化酶相比较，酶在有机溶剂中的稳定性、耐受性和酶活力得到了大幅度提高。 天眼查资料显示，云南维他源生物科技有限公司，成立于2018年，位于昆明市，是一家以从事医药制造业为主的企业。企业注册资本2400万人民币。通过天眼查大数据分析，云南维他源生物科技有限公司共对外投资了1家企业，参与招投标项目2次，财产线索方面有商标信息10条，专利信息29条，此外企业还拥有行政许可21个。 声明：市场有风险，投资需谨慎。本文为AI基于第三方数据生成，仅供参考，不构成个人投资建议。

title: Menstruación y vergüenza en aulas: la razón por la que 1 de cada 5 adolescentes dejó de ir al colegio
meta_description: Las niñas y adolescentes en Perú enfrentan estigmas y tabúes sobre la menstruación, afectando su vida escolar y provocando ausentismo, según un informe del proyecto Nuevas Reglas.
headings: Menstruación y vergüenza en las aulas: la razón por la que 1 de cada 5 adolescentes dejó de ir al colegio en Perú
Las niñas y adolescentes en Perú enfrentan estigmas y tabúes sobre la menstruación, lo que afecta su vida escolar y provoca ausentismo, según un informe del proyecto Nuevas Reglas.
Ausencia de espacios e insumos adecuados
body_text: Toma de San Marcos HOY EN VIVO: últimas noticias, situación de los estudiantes, rechazo a la reelección de la rectora Jerí Ramón y más Corte de luz en Lima del 14 al 16 de mayo: consulta horarios y distritos afectados, según Pluz Energía La menstruación continúa rodeada de estigmas y tabúes que afectan la vida escolar de niñas y adolescentes en el Perú. Vergüenza, miedo, inseguridad y ausentismo son algunas de las consecuencias que enfrentan por la falta de información, acompañamiento y condiciones adecuadas en sus colegios. En el marco del Día de la Higiene Menstrual , que se conmemora cada 28 de mayo, el proyecto Nuevas Reglas advirtió sobre la necesidad de garantizar una educación menstrual digna, segura e informada. Una de cada cinco adolescentes menstruantes reportó haber faltado al colegio por causas vinculadas a la menstruación, según una encuesta encargada por Plan International en Lima y Piura. PUEDES VER: Aprobado por el Gobierno | Docentes tendrán cinco años para acreditar maestría tras nombramiento extraordinario De acuerdo con una encuesta encargada a Clio Consulting y aplicada a 572 niñas, niños y adolescentes de nueve instituciones educativas de Lima y seis de Piura, el 19,6% de adolescentes menstruantes afirmó haber faltado al colegio por razones relacionadas con la menstruación. El estudio también revela brechas en el acceso a información. En Lima, el 42,4% de niñas y adolescentes demostró un conocimiento adecuado sobre la menstruación, mientras que en Piura la cifra apenas llegó al 21,2%. La coordinadora del proyecto Nuevas Reglas, Stephania Lozano, señaló que la realidad de las niñas y adolescentes atraviesa distintos niveles: en los entornos familiares, aparece la ausencia de diálogo y la falta de confianza; en los espacios educativos, se manifiesta el desconocimiento de algunos docentes para abordar el tema; en el ámbito sociocultural, persisten estigmas, tabúes y desinformación; en la infraestructura, destacan limitaciones de acceso a agua segura e insumos de aseo; mientras que, en lo institucional, se identifica una articulación limitada entre actores. PUEDES VER: Aumenta a 1.658 los contagios por virus Coxsackie en el Perú, según Minsa: Lambayeque registra 300 casos en 50 colegios Especialistas advierten que la falta de baños seguros, agua, insumos de aseo y orientación adecuada puede reforzar la vergüenza y limitar la participación de las escolares. A ello se suman burlas o comentarios de sus pares, tanto en la escuela como en espacios digitales, lo que impacta en su autoestima y bienestar. "Es esencial que su entorno tenga los conocimientos y siga actitudes positivas sobre el tema para que puedan dialogar con ellas de manera natural y respetuosa", agregó Lozano. Por su parte, Milovan Bojovic, brand manager para la región Andes, indicó que ninguna niña o adolescente debería sentir vergüenza o miedo por vivir un proceso natural como la menstruación. La actual fase de Nuevas Reglas, que va entre el 2025 y el 2028, busca impactar a 121.115 personas de 15 escuelas y sus comunidades en Lima y Piura. La iniciativa contempla capacitaciones a docentes y obstetras, formación de lideresas adolescentes, mejoras en baños escolares, entrega de kits de salud menstrual y el uso de la app educativa Menstruaventuras. ¡Sigue a La República en WhatsApp! title: Mexican flavours and Latin rhythms light up Chaguanas
meta_description: Fire­stone Restau­rant of Brent­wood brought Mex­i­can flair to Ch­agua­nas with an ex­tend­ed Cin­co de Mayo cel­e­bra­tion on May 5.
headings: Mexican flavours and Latin rhythms light up Chaguanas
TTIVF leads conversation on fertility care
Indo-Caribbean rhythms shine at Mother’s Day Spectacular
body_text: Fire­stone Restau­rant of Brent­wood brought Mex­i­can flair to Ch­agua­nas with an ex­tend­ed Cin­co de Mayo cel­e­bra­tion on May 5. Brent­wood Mall, Ch­agua­nas, came alive with colour, flavour and fes­tive en­er­gy as Fire­stone Restau­rant & Treats Bar host­ed the vi­brant cel­e­bra­tion in ho­n­our of Cin­co de Mayo, trans­form­ing its fa­mil­iar din­ing space in­to a hub of Mex­i­can-in­spired cul­ture and cui­sine. Pa­trons were treat­ed to an im­mer­sive ex­pe­ri­ence as the restau­rant leaned in­to the spir­it of the oc­ca­sion. The restau­rant of­fered a menu rich with Tex-Mex favourites, from siz­zling fa­ji­tas to loaded na­chos and flavour­ful en­chi­ladas. The culi­nary of­fer­ings re­flect­ed the bold tastes of Mex­i­can gas­tron­o­my, draw­ing a steady crowd through­out the evening. The cel­e­bra­tion ex­tend­ed be­yond food, cap­tur­ing the essence of Cin­co de Mayo as a cul­tur­al event rather than just a din­ing ex­pe­ri­ence. Fes­tive dé­cor, up­beat mu­sic and a live­ly at­mos­phere cre­at­ed a wel­com­ing space for fam­i­lies, young pro­fes­sion­als and food lovers ea­ger to take part in the oc­ca­sion. Fire­stone’s in­volve­ment al­so un­der­scored a broad­er cul­tur­al con­nec­tion. Rep­re­sen­ta­tives of the restau­rant host­ed ac­tiv­i­ties in col­lab­o­ra­tion with the Mex­i­can diplo­mat­ic com­mu­ni­ty to high­light the grow­ing ap­pre­ci­a­tion for cul­tur­al ex­change in Trinidad and To­ba­go. This col­lab­o­ra­tion added a lay­er of au­then­tic­i­ty to the restau­rant’s cel­e­bra­tion, re­in­forc­ing its com­mit­ment to em­brac­ing in­ter­na­tion­al tra­di­tions. Cin­co de Mayo, of­ten mis­un­der­stood as Mex­i­co’s In­de­pen­dence Day, ac­tu­al­ly com­mem­o­rates the Mex­i­can army’s vic­to­ry over French forces at the Bat­tle of Puebla in 1862. While the his­tor­i­cal roots re­main sig­nif­i­cant, the day has evolved glob­al­ly in­to a cel­e­bra­tion of Mex­i­can cul­ture, par­tic­u­lar­ly through food, drinks, mu­sic and com­mu­ni­ty gath­er­ings. For many at­ten­dees, Fire­stone’s event pro­vid­ed more than just a meal—it was an op­por­tu­ni­ty to con­nect with a dif­fer­ent cul­ture in a re­laxed, lo­cal set­ting. As one pa­tron shared, “It’s nice to see places here em­brac­ing oth­er cul­tures like this. The food, the vibes—it re­al­ly feels like a cel­e­bra­tion.” Be­sides the food, Latin dancer Nali­ni Akal played an im­por­tant role dur­ing the evening. Akal per­formed for the mixed crowd of at­ten­dees, who en­joyed her per­for­mance and lat­er joined her on the dance floor to the beat of Latin mu­sic. Al­so present at Fire­stone Restau­rant were mem­bers of the diplo­mat­ic corps, Gov­ern­ment of­fi­cials, SoE Gold Com­man­der DCP Suzette Mar­tin, to­geth­er with oth­er of­fi­cers, busi­ness­peo­ple and oth­er dis­tin­guished guests. With events like these, Fire­stone Restau­rant will con­tin­ue to carve out a space not just as a din­ing des­ti­na­tion, but as a cul­tur­al meet­ing point where glob­al tra­di­tions are brought to life in the heart of cen­tral Trinidad. title: Fuel Pump Recommendation for 1987 PU 22R - YotaTech Forums
meta_description: 86-95 Trucks & 4Runners - Fuel Pump Recommendation for 1987 PU 22R - Hi, I am getting some stuttering issues climbing a big (10% grades) mountain pass. I'm committed to replacing my fuel pump but I'm curious what I should get. It's the mechanical pump since it's a 22R. Should I get the Delphi?...
body_text: 86-95 Trucks & 4Runners 2nd/3rd gen pickups, and 1st/2nd gen 4Runners with IFS Community Links Social Groups Pictures & Albums Members Search Forums Tag Search Advanced Search Find All Liked Posts Go to Page... Fuel Pump Recommendation for 1987 PU 22R Reply Subscribe Thread Tools Mar 20, 2018 | 06:00 PM # 1 jb9 Registered User Joined: Nov 2014 Posts: 47 Likes: 4 Fuel Pump Recommendation for 1987 PU 22R Hi, I am getting some stuttering issues climbing a big (10% grades) mountain pass. I'm committed to replacing my fuel pump but I'm curious what I should get. It's the mechanical pump since it's a 22R. Should I get the Delphi? https://www.rockauto.com/en/moreinfo...277502&jsn=386 I'd love to hear what folks recommend. The truck is running well on the flats... Thanks. Last edited by jb9; Mar 20, 2018 at 06:02 PM . Reply 0 0 jb9 View Public Profile Find More Posts by jb9 View iTrader Profile Mar 20, 2018 | 06:50 PM # 2 old87yota Registered User Joined: Jun 2013 Posts: 3,112 Likes: 582 From: Portland, Oregon, USA Are you sure the fuel pump is the issue? If you are committed to replacing the pump, the best option would to buy the OEM Kyosan Denki fuel pump, however, they can be expensive and hard to find. I currently have the same Delphi fuel pump you listed and have had no problems with it. It was installed exactly one year ago this week. The Delphi looked to be higher quality than other aftermarket replacements. It would be a good idea to replace the fuel filter if you haven't already. Reply 0 0 old87yota View Public Profile Find More Posts by old87yota View iTrader Profile Mar 20, 2018 | 07:15 PM # 3 jb9 Registered User Joined: Nov 2014 Posts: 47 Likes: 4 Thank you, that's a good suggestion. I do have the Factory OEM Fuel Filter and will probably replace that first. I just moved from sea level to the intermountain west and the terrain here is much more severe. I'm homesteading and I definitely need my truck right now! I will replace the fuel filter tomorrow but I may just purchase the Delphi to have it on hand. Reply 0 0 jb9 View Public Profile Find More Posts by jb9 View iTrader Profile Mar 20, 2018 | 08:03 PM # 4 se7enine Registered User iTrader: ( 2 ) Joined: Nov 2006 Posts: 546 Likes: 16 From: Reno , Nevada Check your timing, you may need to advance it a little to compensate. Also if you are above 4000ft it might be beneficial to install Toyota's HAC (High Altitude Compensation) valve. It will help air/fuel mixtures by adding more air to low/high speed circuits. I also think it advances the timing but I'm not 100% on that. Last edited by se7enine; Mar 20, 2018 at 08:08 PM . Reply 0 0 se7enine View Public Profile Find More Posts by se7enine View iTrader Profile Mar 22, 2018 | 07:58 AM # 5 jb9 Registered User Joined: Nov 2014 Posts: 47 Likes: 4 I just ordered the fuel pump and watched a video on replacing it. The fuel pump will come with 2 gaskets and I will reuse the existing spacer block. I saw a video in which the person used silicone to combine all the gaskets and block together. Does this make sense? Also, will I need to remove the coolant line? It looks like with the 22R, there is enough room for me to get the actuator arm out of there. Any thoughts? Reply 0 0 jb9 View Public Profile Find More Posts by jb9 View iTrader Profile Mar 22, 2018 | 08:37 AM # 6 old87yota Registered User Joined: Jun 2013 Posts: 3,112 Likes: 582 From: Portland, Oregon, USA I just used the gaskets and spacer without any other sealant. Fuel pump >> gasket >> spacer >> gasket >> head. I ended up removing the upper radiator hose to fix a coolant leak, so I am not sure if there is enough room. Reply 0 0 old87yota View Public Profile Find More Posts by old87yota View iTrader Profile Apr 8, 2018 | 04:23 PM # 7 jb9 Registered User Joined: Nov 2014 Posts: 47 Likes: 4 Thanks old87yota. I'm getting ready to install the fuel pump and I think I should have enough room to get the new one in without removing the radiator hose. I have about 2 1/2"-3" of space. Here are a few photos of what I am looking at. title: Nancy Guthrie Case Latest News: Ex-FBI Expert Says Kidnappers 'Didn't Care' If She Died, 'Tortured' Family With Ransom Notes as Probe Intensifies, No Breakthrough Yet
meta_description: Nancy Guthrie Case Latest News: The disappearance of Nancy Guthrie, the 84-year-old mother of NBC anchor Savannah Guthrie, remains unsolved more than two months
body_text: N ancy Guthrie Case Latest News: The disappearance of Nancy Guthrie, the 84-year-old mother of NBC anchor Savannah Guthrie, remains unsolved more than two months after she was abducted from her home in Tucson, Arizona, on January 31, 2026. Authorities have confirmed signs of a violent abduction, including blood evidence at the scene, but no suspects have been identified, and no arrests have been made so far. Despite extensive investigation by local authorities and federal agencies, officials say there has been no breakthrough in determining her whereabouts or condition. Ex-FBI Expert: Motive 'Simple,' Family 'Tortured' Former FBI agent Jennifer Coffindaffer has described the case as a straightforward kidnapping-for-ransom scenario, suggesting investigators likely understood the motive early on. According to her assessment, the perpetrators "didn't care" whether Guthrie survived and instead focused on extracting money. She further claimed the suspects "tortured" the family emotionally through a series of ransom communications, exploiting the absence of proof of life while continuing to make demands. Nancy Guthrie Case Latest News: Chilling Ransom Notes Raise More Questions Recent developments have centered on multiple ransom notes sent to media outlets, including TMZ, containing contradictory claims about Guthrie's fate. – One message claimed she was dead and offered details for payment – Another suggested she had been seen alive in Sonora, Mexico – Payments demanded ranged around one bitcoin, with split-payment conditions Investigators and experts have expressed skepticism, with Coffindaffer stating the notes appear designed to manipulate and profit from the family's distress rather than provide credible leads. Authorities have not verified the authenticity of these messages and have not made any ransom payments. Nancy Guthrie Case Latest News: 'Scammers' or Key Clues? FBI Still Investigating While some believe the notes could contain fragments of real information, experts widely suspect they are the work of opportunistic scammers exploiting a high-profile case. Coffindaffer noted that a legitimate source would likely pursue the existing reward exceeding $1 million, rather than demand smaller cryptocurrency payments, further casting doubt on the sender's credibility. Nancy Guthrie Case Latest News: Pressure Mounts, But No Arrests Yet The case has gained renewed attention following Savannah Guthrie's return to television, which experts say is keeping national focus on the investigation and increasing pressure on those responsible. Authorities continue to urge the public to come forward with any information, emphasising that even a single tip could prove critical. Nancy Guthrie Case Latest News: No Proof of Life, No Closure A key concern remains the absence of any confirmed proof of life, a factor that has complicated negotiations and investigative strategy. While the family has publicly expressed hope, they have also acknowledged the possibility of a tragic outcome, underscoring the emotional toll of the prolonged uncertainty. Nancy Guthrie Case Latest News: Investigation Ongoing Law enforcement agencies, including the FBI and local authorities, continue to examine all leads, forensic evidence, and communications linked to the case. As of now, the Nancy Guthrie case remains one of the most high-profile unsolved kidnappings of 2026, with investigators facing mounting pressure but no confirmed suspects, no verified ransom trail, and no clear answers. Nancy Guthrie is the 84-year-old mother of NBC journalist Savannah Guthrie, who was reportedly abducted from her home in Tucson, Arizona, in January 2026. Q2. What do investigators believe is the motive behind the kidnapping? According to former FBI experts, the case appears to be a kidnapping-for-ransom, with perpetrators allegedly focused on extracting money rather than ensuring the victim's safety. Q3. What is known about the ransom notes? Multiple ransom messages have been sent to media outlets with conflicting claims about Guthrie's condition. Experts believe many of these notes may be attempts to manipulate or scam the family rather than provide credible information. Q4. Has there been any breakthrough in the investigation? No. Authorities have confirmed that there are still no suspects, arrests, or verified leads, and the case remains unsolved. Q5. Is there any proof that Nancy Guthrie is alive? As of the latest updates, investigators have not confirmed any proof of life, which continues to complicate the case and raises serious concerns about her condition. title: Woman, dog killed in Baldwin County house fire - 41NBC News | WMGT-DT
meta_description: A woman and a dog died in a house fire Tuesday in Baldwin County, according to fire officials.
headings: Woman, dog killed in Baldwin County house fire
body_text: BALDWIN COUNTY, Georgia (41NBC/WMGT) — A woman and a dog died in a house fire Tuesday in Baldwin County, according to Baldwin County Fire Rescue. In a social media post , the agency said crews responded to a residential fire in the 100 block of Old Colony Farm Road. Firefighters arrived to find heavy fire conditions at a single-story home, according to the post. Bystanders told crews someone was still inside the home, which led firefighters to begin an interior fire attack and search operation. According to the post, firefighters found a 63-year-old woman inside the laundry room of the home who died from injuries sustained in the fire. A dog was also found dead. The fire was later brought under control. The cause and origin of the fire remain under investigation.

title: 只有愚蠢的人，才会花几十万在农村建房子！以前我不懂，花50万回村建房后，终于懂了_新房_邻里_村里
body_text: 网上都说：“只有愚蠢的人，才会花几十万在农村建房子”，以前不懂，可9年前花50万在老家建了栋房子后，我终于懂了。 那时候看到村里家家户户都扎堆盖新房，二层小楼一栋比一栋气派，走在村里路上，满眼都是崭新的楼房，唯独自家老房子低矮老旧，看着格外寒酸。 再加上，村里人闲话多，背地里总爱议论谁家儿女有出息、回乡盖房子，谁家守着老房子没本事等等。 虽然我打心底看不惯这种攀比风气，但架不住人情闲话，一时好面子，也动了回乡建房争口气的念头。 那时候，我也觉得像我们这样农村走出来的，不可能一辈子只住在城里的，因为不管以后年纪大了回乡养老，还是逢年过节走亲访友，家里有栋气派新房，腰杆都能挺得直一点。 我以为兜里有钱，回农村建房会很容易，可真正动工之后，我才彻底体会到，回村建房根本不是光掏钱就能行的。 首先，现在农村建房规矩特别多，要层层审批、层层报备，为了获得建房许可，我来回往返村镇两头跑腿盖章，前前后后耗了好两个月的空闲时间。 接着是邻里矛盾。动工挖地基的时候，隔壁邻居就找上门，说我房子占了公共过道，非要逼着我们往后退让半米，不然就拦着工地不让施工。可我们两家过道的宽度，几十年一直如此，全村邻里都心知肚明的，可他就非要我再让半米，好方便他们家停车。 我不想停工耽误工期，也不想硬碰硬闹僵邻里关系，最后只能妥协，做出让步，而这样做，间接就缩小了家里的一些空间。 等到楼房主体快封顶时，又有人出来挑毛病，嫌弃我家房屋层高更高、屋顶是尖顶造型，造谣说会压住他家住宅运势，天天到工地捣乱，逼着我拆掉重做平顶。 那段时间，我天天蹲守工地盯进度、防偷工减料，整日风吹日晒的，操心费力，头发都折腾得白了一大片。 除了折腾人，还让我多花不少钱。原本预估四十万就能落地的房子，由于误工损耗、邻里协调、材料加价、人工上浮等各种额外支出，硬生生让我多花了十万出头，一栋才占地100平的二层半小楼，硬生生要我花了五十万元。 这房子盖了8个月，终于完工。当时我的房子，不算全村最高的，但造型独特，布局和城里的别墅差不多，就成了全村上数一数二的好房子。 刚建好那阵子，村里人都上门夸赞和羡慕，说我有本事，说我们父母有福气，当时我站在新房院子里，心里满是虚荣的满足感，觉得这五十万虽然花得挺多的，而我也遭了不少罪，但却觉得一切付出都很值得，毕竟面子里子都有了。 因为我的事业在城里，孩子也在城里上学，父母更在城里养老，全家扎根在城里二三十年了，所以，老家只有逢年过节才会回去住几天。 算下来，我建房九年了，可回去住的日子，前后加起来都没超过两个月。平日里，老家的大门都是常年紧锁，没人打理的。 而没人在家，再好的房子都会荒废，每次隔几个月抽空回乡一趟，推开院门都是让看着心酸的。 院子里杂草长得比膝盖还高，墙角爬满湿滑青苔，地面落满枯枝烂叶，原本我最得意的小鱼池，也变得臭水沟一样。 走进屋里更让人糟心，窗台桌面都铺着厚厚一层灰，墙角屋檐挂满密密麻麻的蜘蛛网，卧室里的被褥床单长期密闭受潮，一打开总会有潮霉味，每次回去根本没法直接落脚入住。 一般回去短短住几天，前两天都是没法休息的，全家人都要围着屋子大扫除，扫地拖地、擦灰洗被褥、清理杂草蛛网等等。 本来回乡是想散心放松、歇歇身心的，结果反倒比在城里干活还要劳累。而折腾完卫生，仅剩的闲暇时间也所剩无几，每次回来都这么累，搞得孩子和老伴都没了半点回老家的心情。 因为我一分一厘打拼攒下来的50万积蓄，全部砸在这栋农村房子上，感觉打了水漂一样，除了让我有面子，就没给我带来多大的益处。 在看着同事朋友，一个个在城里好几套房子，我就有过一丝后悔，感觉要是当年我不冲动建房，把这笔钱添补在城里置业，不管是全款小户型，还是大额首付置换大房子，如今我也能手握实打实的固定资产，想变现也能变现。 不像农村这栋新房，说也是固定资产，但一年住不了几天，闲置又会荒废，想卖根本没人要，并且农村的房子也不能卖，想出租也没有客源，村里年轻人都外出务工，家家户户房子都空闲，根本没人租房。 就这样，五十万砸进去，却换不来一分钱收益，换不来安稳的居住环境，只能换来一栋常年空置、日渐破败的房子，让我怎么算都觉得划不来。 最让我心里不平衡的，是我同龄的发小。当年我们俩经济条件差不多，手里积蓄也不相上下，那时候我坚持要回村盖新房，他却格外冷静理智，老房子比我家的还烂，却没跟风建房。 当年他只是拿出五六万元，简单把家里老旧平房翻新加固了下，然后再装修了内饰，前后不到一个月就完事了，虽然花钱少，但这么一装，简约朴实、干净耐看，却让我觉得他的房子，比那些新建水泥房还漂亮。 虽然逢年过节回乡，他也要和我一样，要大扫除后才能入住，体验感也很差。但不同的是，他只花了几万块小钱，轻轻松松搞定住处，手里剩下大把积蓄存起来养老、补贴家用，日子过得宽松自在、毫无压力。 而我是掏空全部家底五十万，咬牙硬撑盖起二层小楼，看似风光体面，可手里空空荡荡，日子过得紧巴巴，我就觉得有点亏了。每次和发小坐在一起闲聊，对比之下我都觉得自己像个傻子，盲目跟风、死要面子，花了那么多钱，最终却造了个门面而已。 建房这9年时间，除了建房后的第一年，我为这新房开心的笑过，后面这些年，我都是满心后悔的。感觉回农村花重金建房，大多只能换来一时好面子，根本换不来多少好处。 所以，劝大家别盲目跟风回村建房，只要农村的老房子结构安全就够用了。要想住得舒心一点，就简单翻新下，能供自己偶尔回去落脚、祭祖和应急就行了，真没必要掏空几十万积蓄，去攀比盖小洋楼。 我们普通人挣钱不容易，每一分钱都浸着汗水，千万别把血汗钱，白白浪费在一年住不了几天、卖不掉、用不上的闲置空房上。 返回搜狐，查看更多
